cause_analysis.narrative: Elume Medspa churned on 2026-03-11 after 148 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2025-12-11 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "issue". Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Implement a 'cancellation keyword' realtime alert to AMs + Growth team. Today this signal is discovered only post-churn.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-12 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: A Message from the CEO 💌\n\nBody: Thank you for your email. My urgency was due to the fact that I was not b…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
